channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Farrer candidates discuss small and large donations in election campaigns
item.description: In the Farrer by-election, independent Michelle Milthorpe and One Nation candidate David Farley emphasise the importance of local donors in funding their campaigns. Both candidates claim that small do...

item.title: Luhya Elders Call for ODM Leadership Change Over Poor Treatment of Young Leaders
item.description: The Luhya Council of Elders has publicly criticised ODM party leader Oburu Oginga, citing poor leadership and mistreatment of young party members. Led by national chairperson Noah Wekesa, the elders d...

item.title: PM Modi launches ₹4,000 crore development projects for Sikkim’s growth on its 50th Statehood Anniversary
item.description: On April 28, 2026, Prime Minister Narendra Modi attended the closing ceremony of Sikkim’s 50th statehood celebrations in Gangtok. During the event, he launched a series of development projects worth o...

item.title: Oil Prices Rise Amid US Review of Iran Deal to Reopen Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Oil prices don go up again on Tuesday as global investors dey watch closely how United States go respond to one new proposal from Iran to ease the ongoing conflict. The proposal include reopening the ...

item.title: Horoscope Predictions for April 28, 2026
item.description: This horoscope article offers daily guidance for each zodiac sign on April 28, 2026, highlighting opportunities, challenges, and personal growth. Those with birthdays today are influenced by a strong ...

item.title: Illegal Migrants and Labour Exploitation at Traveller Sites Across Britain
item.description: Several traveller sites in England, particularly in Essex, have been identified as locations where illegal migrants are living in caravans and taking informal work. Sites such as Buckles Lane and Hove...

item.title: MacBook Pro M5 offers high performance and long battery life across multiple configurations
item.description: Apple has upgraded its MacBook Pro line with the new M5-series chips, delivering impressive performance across three tiers: M5, M5 Pro, and M5 Max. The laptops come in 14-inch and 16-inch models, with...

item.title: Kenya Wraps Up 18-Month Police Deployment in Haiti
item.description: Kenya has officially wrapped up its participation in the Multinational Security Support Mission in Haiti after an 18-month deployment. Interior Cabinet Secretary Kipchumba Murkomen hailed the mission ...

item.title: How the Evacuation of Pripyat Was Organized After the Chernobyl Disaster
item.description: The article recounts the evacuation of Pripyat following the 1986 Chernobyl nuclear disaster, focusing on the role of Maria Protsenko, the city’s chief architect. After reactor number four exploded, r...

item.title: Constitutional Court Ruling Limits SAHRC's Enforcement Powers
item.description: The Constitutional Court recently ruled that the South African Human Rights Commission (SAHRC) cannot issue binding directives. This judgement removes a crucial tool for enforcing human rights and dis...

item.title: Realtors in Fraser Valley Caution Against Potential Safety Threats Following Disturbing Incidents
item.description: Real estate professionals in the Lower Mainland are raising alarms over a series of unsettling encounters that have highlighted the dangers of working with unfamiliar clients. Xyrina Gutierrez, a real...

item.title: Raiders Injury Crisis Sees Martin and Hosking Ruled Out
item.description: The Canberra Raiders are grappling with a significant injury crisis ahead of their Saturday clash against the Gold Coast Titans on the Gold Coast. Two key players, back-rowers Noah Martin and Zac Hosk...

item.title: Trump and his closest advisers in Oval Office after shooting attempt at Correspondents' Dinner
item.description: A viral photo from the White House has emerged, showing President Donald Trump and some of his key advisers gathered in the Oval Office after a shooting attempt during the White House Correspondents' ...

item.title: South Korea Investigates Syringe Stockpiling Amid Supply Disruptions from Middle East Conflict
item.description: South Korea don start dey investigate some medical device companies wey dem suspect say dem dey stockpile syringes and needles. The wahala start after US and Israeli strikes on Iran plus near closure ...

item.title: Pedro Pascal Gets Emotional at ‘Mandalorian and Grogu’ Panel in Mexico City
item.description: Chilean actor Pedro Pascal became visibly emotional during the Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu panel at CCXP Mexico in Mexico City. Joined by director Jon Favreau, Pascal spoke about the signific...

item.title: More than 8,000 Children in Philippine Care, 1,672 Legally Available for Adoption
item.description: As of April 2026, there are 8,051 children under the care of child-caring agencies in the Philippines, according to the National Authority for Child Care (NACC). Out of these, 5,547 children are being...

item.title: Soul Mate Trailer Showcases Taecyeon and Hayato Isomura's Bond
item.description: The trailer for the upcoming Netflix series 'Soul Mate' highlights the emotional connection between its lead stars, Ok Taecyeon of 2PM fame and Japanese actor Hayato Isomura. Published by ABS-CBN News...

item.title: Bulldogs’ Jacob Preston battles shoulder injuries to remain on the field
item.description: Canterbury Bulldogs’ NSW Origin hopeful Jacob Preston has been enduring painkilling injections in both AC joints since the start of the season. He is set to switch to the left side to cover for injure...

item.title: London Marathon runner celebrates finishing last while raising funds for mental health charity
item.description: Clair Roberts, a 35-year-old from Milton Keynes, has spoken of her pride after finishing last in the London Marathon, completing the race in 12 hours and 16 minutes. Despite the physical and emotional...

item.title: Rijiju criticizes Congress over Women’s Reservation Bill defeat, quotes Tharoor’s agreement on party’s stance
item.description: Union Minister Kiren Rijiju has made a bold statement regarding the Congress party's stance on women's issues following the defeat of the Women's Reservation Amendment Bill. Rijiju recalled a post-ses...
